mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA_KRI_D ( BAS_YYMM , BAS_LONG , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , BF_QT_CUST_CNT , BF_QT_TRN_AMT , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , INDE_CUST_RT , INDE_AMT_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , '00' AS BAS_LONG --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,4) AS RSK_CATG2_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , M.VALT_BRNO AS BRNO , NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0) , NVL(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0) , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_CUST_CNT - NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0)) / DECODE(NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0),0,1,BF_QT_CUST_CNT),2) END AS INDE_CUST_RT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_TRN_AMT - BF_QT_TRN_AMT) / DECODE(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0,1,BF_QT_TRN_AMT),2) END AS INDE_RT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'SYSTEM' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(TRN) PARALLEL(TRN 8) */ --당월 RC.RSK_ELMT_C , TRN.VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO ) AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , TRUNC(SUM(DL_AMT)/ 1000000) PRS_QT_TRN_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , SRBA_NAT_T RC WHERE 1=1 AND TRN.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND TRN.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND TRN.DL_AMT > #{extrBasAmt} AND TRN.RNMCNO = RC.RNMCNO AND RC.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY RC.RSK_ELMT_C, TRN.VALT_BRNO ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(TRN) PARALLEL(TRN 8) */ --전월 RC.RSK_ELMT_C , TRN.VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO ) AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , TRUNC(SUM(DL_AMT)/ 1000000) BF_QT_TRN_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , SRBA_NAT_T RC WHERE 1=1 AND TRN.DL_DT >= #{pgtTrnSdt} AND TRN.DL_DT < #{pgtTrnEdt} AND TRN.DL_AMT > #{extrBasAmt} AND TRN.RNMCNO = RC.RNMCNO AND RC.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} GROUP BY RC.RSK_ELMT_C, TRN.VALT_BRNO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)

INSERT INTO SRBA_KRI_D ( BAS_YYMM , BAS_LONG , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , BF_QT_CUST_CNT , BF_QT_TRN_AMT , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , INDE_CUST_RT , INDE_AMT_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , #{basLong} AS BAS_LONG --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,4) AS RSK_CATG2_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , M.BRNO AS BRNO , NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0) , NVL(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0) , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , CASE WHEN A.BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_CUST_CNT - NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0)) / DECODE(NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0),0,1,BF_QT_CUST_CNT),2) END AS INDE_CUST_RT , CASE WHEN A.BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_TRN_AMT - BF_QT_TRN_AMT) / DECODE(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0,1,BF_QT_TRN_AMT),2) END AS INDE_RT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'SYSTEM' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT --당기 RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , SUM( PRS_QT_CUST_CNT ) AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , SUM( PRS_QT_TRN_AMT ) AS PRS_QT_TRN_AMT FROM SRBA_KRI_D WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_LONG = '00' AND BAS_YYMM >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND BAS_YYMM < #{tgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C, BRNO ) M ,( SELECT --전기 RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , SUM( PRS_QT_CUST_CNT ) AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , SUM( PRS_QT_TRN_AMT ) AS BF_QT_TRN_AMT FROM SRBA_KRI_D WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_LONG = '00' AND BAS_YYMM >= #{pgtTrnSdt} AND BAS_YYMM < #{pgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C, BRNO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND M.BRNO = A.BRNO(+)

INSERT INTO SRBA_KRI_D ( BAS_YYMM , BAS_LONG , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , BF_QT_CUST_CNT , BF_QT_TRN_AMT , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , INDE_CUST_RT , INDE_AMT_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , #{basLong} AS BAS_LONG --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,4) AS RSK_CATG2_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , '99999' AS BRNO , NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0) , NVL(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0) , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , CASE WHEN A.RSK_ELMT_C IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_CUST_CNT - NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0)) / DECODE(NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0),0,1,BF_QT_CUST_CNT),2) END AS INDE_CUST_RT , CASE WHEN A.RSK_ELMT_C IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_TRN_AMT - BF_QT_TRN_AMT) / DECODE(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0,1,BF_QT_TRN_AMT),2) END AS INDE_RT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'SYSTEM' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT --당기 RSK_ELMT_C , SUM( PRS_QT_CUST_CNT ) AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , SUM( PRS_QT_TRN_AMT ) AS PRS_QT_TRN_AMT FROM SRBA_KRI_D WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_LONG = '00' AND BAS_YYMM >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND BAS_YYMM < #{tgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C ) M ,( SELECT --전기 RSK_ELMT_C , SUM( PRS_QT_CUST_CNT ) AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , SUM( PRS_QT_TRN_AMT ) AS BF_QT_TRN_AMT FROM SRBA_KRI_D WHERE 1=1 AND BAS_LONG = '00' AND BAS_YYMM >= #{pgtTrnSdt} AND BAS_YYMM < #{pgtTrnEdt} GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C(+)

INSERT INTO SRBA_KRI_D ( BAS_YYMM , BAS_LONG , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , BF_QT_CUST_CNT , BF_QT_TRN_AMT , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , INDE_CUST_RT , INDE_AMT_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , '00' AS BAS_LONG --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,4) AS RSK_CATG2_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , M.VALT_BRNO AS BRNO , NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0) , NVL(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0) , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_CUST_CNT - NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0)) / DECODE(NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0),0,1,BF_QT_CUST_CNT),2) END AS INDE_CUST_RT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_TRN_AMT - BF_QT_TRN_AMT) / DECODE(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0,1,BF_QT_TRN_AMT),2) END AS INDE_RT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'SYSTEM' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT 'K50301' AS RSK_ELMT_C , A.BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C , A.PRS_QT_CUST_CNT AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , A.PRS_QT_TRN_AMT AS PRS_QT_TRN_AMT FROM ( --K50301 현금거래 규모 SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_CASH_ITRN_CNT + NIC32.MM_CASH_OTRN_CNT),0) AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_CASH_ITRN_AMT + NIC32.MM_CASH_OTRN_AMT),0) AS PRS_QT_TRN_AMT --현금거래 규모 FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnSdt},1,6) AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= SUBSTR(#{tgtTrnEdt},1,6) AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A ) M ,( SELECT 'K50301' AS RSK_ELMT_C , A.BRN_CD AS VALT_BRNO , ' ' AS SRVC_G_C , A.BF_QT_CUST_CNT AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , A.BF_QT_TRN_AMT AS BF_QT_TRN_AMT FROM ( --K50301 현금거래 규모 SELECT NVL(NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD,'00000') AS BRN_CD , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_CASH_ITRN_CNT + NIC32.MM_CASH_OTRN_CNT),0) AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , NVL(SUM(NIC32.MM_CASH_ITRN_AMT + NIC32.MM_CASH_OTRN_AMT),0) AS BF_QT_TRN_AMT --현금거래 규모 FROM NIC32B NIC32 , NIC01B NIC01 WHERE NIC32.BAS_YYMM >= SUBSTR(#{pgtTrnSdt},1,6) AND NIC32.BAS_YYMM <= SUBSTR(#{pgtTrnEdt},1,6) AND NIC32.RNMCNO = NIC01.RNMCNO(+) GROUP BY NIC01.CS_MANAG_BRN_CD ) A ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)

INSERT INTO SRBA_KRI_D ( BAS_YYMM , BAS_LONG , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , BF_QT_CUST_CNT , BF_QT_TRN_AMT , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , INDE_CUST_RT , INDE_AMT_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , '00' AS BAS_LONG --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,4) AS RSK_CATG2_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , M.VALT_BRNO AS BRNO , NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0) , NVL(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0) , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_CUST_CNT - NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0)) / DECODE(NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0),0,1,BF_QT_CUST_CNT),2) END AS INDE_CUST_RT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_TRN_AMT - BF_QT_TRN_AMT) / DECODE(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0,1,BF_QT_TRN_AMT),2) END AS INDE_RT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'SYSTEM' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(TRN) PARALLEL(TRN 8) */ --당월 RC.RSK_ELMT_C , TRN.VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO ) AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , TRUNC(SUM(DL_AMT)/ 1000000) PRS_QT_TRN_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , SRBA_CUST_T RC WHERE 1=1 AND TRN.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND TRN.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND TRN.DL_AMT > #{extrBasAmt} AND TRN.RNMCNO = RC.RNMCNO AND RC.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RC.RSK_ELMT_C NOT LIKE 'R3%' GROUP BY RC.RSK_ELMT_C, TRN.VALT_BRNO ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(TRN) PARALLEL(TRN 8) */ --전월 RC.RSK_ELMT_C , TRN.VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO ) AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , TRUNC(SUM(DL_AMT)/ 1000000) BF_QT_TRN_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , SRBA_CUST_T RC WHERE 1=1 AND TRN.DL_DT >= #{pgtTrnSdt} AND TRN.DL_DT < #{pgtTrnEdt} AND TRN.DL_AMT > #{extrBasAmt} AND TRN.RNMCNO = RC.RNMCNO AND RC.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND RC.RSK_ELMT_C NOT LIKE 'R3%' GROUP BY RC.RSK_ELMT_C, TRN.VALT_BRNO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)

INSERT INTO SRBA_KRI_D ( BAS_YYMM , BAS_LONG , RSK_CATG1_C , RSK_CATG2_C , RSK_ELMT_C , BRNO , BF_QT_CUST_CNT , BF_QT_TRN_AMT , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , INDE_CUST_RT , INDE_AMT_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{basYymm} AS BAS_YYMM , '00' AS BAS_LONG --기준반기(00:월집계 , 01: 상반기 , 02: 하반기) , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,2) AS RSK_CATG1_C , SUBSTR(M.RSK_ELMT_C,1,4) AS RSK_CATG2_C , M.RSK_ELMT_C , M.VALT_BRNO AS BRNO , NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0) , NVL(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0) , PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , PRS_QT_TRN_AMT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_CUST_CNT - NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0)) / DECODE(NVL(BF_QT_CUST_CNT,0),0,1,BF_QT_CUST_CNT),2) END AS INDE_CUST_RT , CASE WHEN A.VALT_BRNO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((PRS_QT_TRN_AMT - BF_QT_TRN_AMT) / DECODE(BF_QT_TRN_AMT,0,1,BF_QT_TRN_AMT),2) END AS INDE_RT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME , 'SYSTEM' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT /*+ FULL(TRN) PARALLEL(TRN 8) */ --당월 R.RSK_ELMT_C , TRN.VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO ) AS PRS_QT_CUST_CNT , TRUNC(SUM(DL_AMT)/ 1000000) AS PRS_QT_TRN_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , ( SELECT RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE , E.RSK_ELMT_C FROM SRBA_CUST_T RC , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE E.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND E.BAS_YYMM = RC.BAS_YYMM AND E.RSK_ELMT_C = RC.RSK_ELMT_C AND RC.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R30111' GROUP BY RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE, E.RSK_ELMT_C
UNION ALL
SELECT RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE , E.RSK_ELMT_C FROM SRBA_CUST_T RC , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE E.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND E.BAS_YYMM = RC.BAS_YYMM AND E.RSK_ELMT_C = RC.RSK_ELMT_C AND RC.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R30113' GROUP BY RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE, E.RSK_ELMT_C ) R WHERE 1=1 AND TRN.DL_DT >= #{tgtTrnSdt} AND TRN.DL_DT < #{tgtTrnEdt} AND TRN.DL_AMT > #{extrBasAmt} AND TRN.RNMCNO = R.RNMCNO AND R.RA_ITEM_CODE = SUBSTR(TRN.GDS_NO, 1, 3) GROUP BY R.RSK_ELMT_C, TRN.VALT_BRNO ) M ,( SELECT /*+ FULL(TRN) PARALLEL(TRN 8) */ --전월 R.RSK_ELMT_C , TRN.VALT_BRNO , COUNT(DISTINCT TRN.RNMCNO ) AS BF_QT_CUST_CNT , TRUNC(SUM(DL_AMT)/ 1000000) AS BF_QT_TRN_AMT FROM KRBA_TRN_I TRN , ( SELECT RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE , E.RSK_ELMT_C FROM SRBA_CUST_T RC , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE E.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND E.BAS_YYMM = RC.BAS_YYMM AND E.RSK_ELMT_C = RC.RSK_ELMT_C AND RC.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R30111' GROUP BY RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE, E.RSK_ELMT_C
UNION ALL
SELECT RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE , E.RSK_ELMT_C FROM SRBA_CUST_T RC , SRBA_ETC_I E WHERE E.BAS_YYMM = #{basYymm} AND E.BAS_YYMM = RC.BAS_YYMM AND E.RSK_ELMT_C = RC.RSK_ELMT_C AND RC.RSK_ELMT_C = 'R30113' GROUP BY RC.RNMCNO, E.RA_ITEM_CODE, E.RSK_ELMT_C ) R WHERE 1=1 AND TRN.DL_DT >= #{pgtTrnSdt} AND TRN.DL_DT < #{pgtTrnEdt} AND TRN.DL_AMT > #{extrBasAmt} AND TRN.RNMCNO = R.RNMCNO AND R.RA_ITEM_CODE = SUBSTR(TRN.GDS_NO, 1, 3) GROUP BY R.RSK_ELMT_C, TRN.VALT_BRNO ) A WHERE 1=1 AND M.RSK_ELMT_C = A.RSK_ELMT_C(+) AND M.VALT_BRNO = A.VALT_BRNO(+)
